fieldValues.value: ext:discovery implementors must pass all structured-filter fixture scenarios (exactMatch: true)

An implementation that declares ext:discovery MUST pass all structured-filter conformance scenarios (exactMatch: true) from the fixture at srs/conformance/discovery/scenarios.json. For each such scenario, the implementation's result set for the specified query MUST equal exactly the specified expectedInstanceIds set — no extra instances and no missing instances.

Structured-filter scenarios can be verified with exact-match semantics because structured filters are deterministic. Requiring exact match (not just superset) ensures that implementations do not inadvertently over-include instances by ignoring a filter axis.
